title: Run and close the natural-case history brief pilot
goal: Collect the registered minimum of natural control and treatment cases, evaluate independently and close with an evidence-bound promotion decision.

approval.note: Any Grabowski preference or standard-path change must cite the complete experiment including null and harmful cases.

acceptance.assertion: At least three natural cases per condition satisfy the registered comparison constraints.
Every observation is evidence-bound, independently scored and condition-blinded or explicitly marked non-comparable.
Failed, null and harmful cases are retained and not averaged away.
The result closes as promote, pilot, defer, reject or archive; automatic policy and routing remain forbidden.

metadata.current_blocker: The required natural future coding cases do not yet exist and must not be fabricated or repeated solely for measurement.

lease_scope_migration.rationale: The pilot executes in Vibe-Lab; Bureau participation is limited to evidence-bound task and decision records.
does_not_establish: safe mutation of terminal historical tasks
